name: Fesenjam (Pomegranate-walnut Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent.
2. Brown the chicken breasts in batches, being careful not to overcrowd the pan.
3. Add lemon juice, pepper, salt (if using), and chicken stock to the skillet with the onions and chicken. Stir well.
4. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce the heat to low. Cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Stir in the pomegranate molasses and walnuts. Return the chicken breasts to the skillet.
6. Simmer for an additional 45 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
7. Serve hot with rice, if desired.
Pomegranate molasses can be found at Middle Eastern food stores. If unavailable, pomegranate juice or grenadine syrup may be substituted.
